name: Vinit Resume LAI
contentText:
Vinit Kumar
vinit928@gmail.com • +91 9896609966 • Bengaluru, India • https://www.linkedin.com/in/vinitkumargoel/
SUMMARY
Passionate Full Stack JavaScript Developer with 10+ years of experience at Wipro, EY, Publicis Sapient, and Cisco. Expertise
in React.js, Node.js, and MERN stack. Skilled in AI applications, including fine-tuning models and building RAG systems. Strong
problem-solving, collaboration, and adaptability to emerging technologies with excellent communication skills.
EXPERIENCE
CISCO, SDE-4
May 2021 - Sep 2025
Team Lead managing a team of 7 members, delivering solutions for Webex Contact Center.
Leading the development of a desktop application using ReactJS, NodeJS, and NextJS to ensure seamless and efficient user
experiences.
Actively involved in developing and fine-tuning AI models to enhance product capabilities, showcasing strong expertise in AI
integration.
Leveraging leadership skills to guide the team, ensure project milestones are met, and foster collaboration for successful delivery.
Publicis Sapient, SDE-3
May 2020 - May 2021
Served Tesco as a client, contributing to core website development using ReactJS for the front-end and NodeJS for back-end
microservices.
Worked with MongoDB for database management, ensuring efficient data handling and storage.
Developed and maintained Admin Panel using ReactJS and CoreUI for a seamless user interface.
Contributed to mobile app development with React Native and Redux, ensuring smooth cross-platform functionality and state
management.
EY GDS, Software engineer
Jan 2020 - May 2020
Served in EY GDS, Client Technology Service Line, responsible for building complex products for both internal use and open
market.
Created pixel-perfect UI using ReactJS to deliver high-quality, responsive web interfaces.
Implemented BDD practices with Selenium and Cypress.js to ensure robust front-end testing.
Developed CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins to deploy code on Azure Kubernetes with Docker images, ensuring seamless and
automated deployments.
WIPRO Digital, Software Engineer
May 2014 - Jan 2020
Developed and enhanced features for Lloyds Credit Card front end application built with ReactJS. Actively fixed release bugs and
optimized UI performance.
Followed TDD and BDD methodologies: Wrote unit tests using Jest and Enzyme for ReactJS components and implemented end-
to-end tests using Cypress.io for robust front-end validation.
Conducted code reviews on GitLab to ensure code quality and team collaboration within a 50+ member team.
Worked on Travel and Expense Management App, contributing to front-end development using AngularJS and back-end
microservices with NodeJS.
Ensured quality deliverables through unit testing for AngularJS and NodeJS using Mocha and Chai under TDD practices.
